name: Emperor of the Sands
text:
Sand Soldiers you play have [Weaponmaster]. (When they're played, you may [Equip] one of your Equipment to them for :rb_rune_rainbow: less.)
:rb_energy_1:, :rb_exhaust:: Play a 2 :rb_might: Sand Soldier unit token to your base. Use only if you've played an Equipment this turn.

Riftbound Legend: Emperor of the Sands. Sand Soldiers you play have [Weaponmaster]. (When they're played, you may [Equip] one of your Equipment to them for [A] less.)
[1], [T]: Play a 2 [S] Sand Soldier unit token to your base. Use only if you've played an Equipment this turn.
